title: eriogonum parvifolium var. lucidum
intro: Eriogonum parvifolium var. lucidum, also known as desert buckwheat, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of desert buckwheat include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote overall well-being. Desert buckwheat can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or salve, making it a versatile herb for various herbal preparations.
